results.alt: Electron microscopy allows us to blast subjects with electron beams rather than photons, enabling resolutions thousands of times finer than optical scopes. At the micro scale, physics begins to behave differently. Surface tension becomes a dominant force, and water droplets act as impenetrable barriers for tiny insects. The Science of Scale
